Rule Description: <html> tag must have a valid lang attribute
How To Fix: Add lang="vi" or lang="en" to <html> tag in root layout.tsx

Rule Description: Each page must have exactly ONE <h1> tag
How To Check: Lighthouse → SEO → Document has a title
How To Fix: Remove extra <h1>s — use <h2>–<h6> for sub-headings

Rule Description: Metadata title must exist and be 50–60 chars — use Next.js Metadata API
How To Check: Lighthouse → SEO → Document has a title
How To Fix: export const metadata: Metadata = { title: '...' } in page.tsx

Rule Description: <meta name=description> must be 120–160 chars — use Next.js Metadata API
How To Fix: export const metadata: Metadata = { description: '...' } in page.tsx

Rule Description: All next/image and tags must have descriptive alt attribute
How To Fix: Add descriptive alt text; use alt="" only for decorative images

Rule Description: Every page must have canonical — use Next.js alternates.canonical in Metadata
How To Check: Lighthouse → SEO → Links are not crawlable
How To Fix: export const metadata: Metadata = { alternates: { canonical: 'https://...' } }

Rule Description: <meta charset=UTF-8> is auto-added by Next.js — verify it is not removed
How To Check: View page source and confirm charset meta exists
How To Fix: Do not override Next.js default charset meta

Rule Description: og:title must be present via Next.js openGraph Metadata
How To Fix: export const metadata: Metadata = { openGraph: { title: '...' } }

Rule Description: og:description must be present via Next.js openGraph Metadata
How To Fix: metadata.openGraph.description = '...'

Rule Description: og:image must be present and ≥ 1200×630px — use Next.js OG image or static asset
How To Fix: metadata.openGraph.images = [{ url: '...', width: 1200, height: 630 }] or use app/opengraph-image.tsx

Rule Description: og:url must match canonical URL
How To Fix: metadata.openGraph.url = 'https://...'

Rule Description: Largest Contentful Paint ≤ 2.5s
How To Fix: Preload hero image with priority prop on <Image>; use static generation (SSG/ISR); reduce TTFB

Rule Description: Cumulative Layout Shift ≤ 0.1
How To Fix: Set explicit width/height on next/image; avoid dynamic content injection above fold

Rule Description: INP (Interaction to Next Paint) ≤ 200ms
How To Fix: Defer non-critical JS; use Suspense boundaries; break long tasks with startTransition

Rule Description: Images below the fold must NOT have priority prop (lazy by default in next/image)
How To Check: Check for priority on non-hero images
How To Fix: Remove priority prop from non-hero images — next/image is lazy by default

Rule Description: CSS/JS must be minified in production — Next.js handles this automatically
How To Fix: Run next build — check bundle analyzer; use dynamic imports for large libraries

Rule Description: Static assets must have Cache-Control max-age ≥ 1 year — configure in next.config.js headers()
How To Check: Lighthouse → Performance → Uses efficient cache policy
How To Fix: Add Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable in next.config.js headers() for /_next/static/

Rule Description: Text < 18pt must have contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 vs background
How To Check: npx axe --tags wcag2aa OR Lighthouse → Accessibility → Color Contrast
How To Fix: Darken text color or lighten background to meet ratio

Rule Description: Text ≥ 18pt or 14pt Bold must have contrast ratio ≥ 3:1
How To Fix: Adjust font color variables (e.g., --color-heading)

Rule Description: UI components (borders/icons) must have contrast ratio ≥ 3:1
How To Fix: Update border/icon colors in Tailwind config or CSS variables

Rule Description: sitemap.xml must exist — generate via app/sitemap.ts in Next.js App Router
How To Fix: Create app/sitemap.ts exporting MetadataRoute.Sitemap and submit to Google Search Console

Rule Description: robots.txt must exist — generate via app/robots.ts in Next.js App Router
How To Fix: Create app/robots.ts exporting MetadataRoute.Robots; ensure Disallow: / is NOT set for public pages

Rule Description: Key pages must have JSON-LD structured data (Article/BreadcrumbList/etc.)
How To Check: Lighthouse → SEO → Structured data OR search.google.com/rich-results
How To Fix: Add <script type="application/ld+json"> with valid Schema.org markup in page.tsx or layout.tsx

Rule Description: No internal links should return 4xx/5xx
How To Fix: Fix or redirect broken URLs in next.config.js redirects()

Rule Description: Site must serve all pages over HTTPS
How To Fix: Configure HTTPS at hosting level (Vercel auto-handles) + add HSTS header

Rule Description: Page must be mobile-friendly — Next.js auto-adds viewport meta in App Router
How To Check: Lighthouse → SEO → Tap targets sized appropriately
How To Fix: Verify viewport meta in layout.tsx — use responsive Tailwind classes; test mobile breakpoints

Rule Description: Use export const metadata: Metadata for static pages
How To Fix: import type { Metadata } from 'next'; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: '...', description: '...' }

Rule Description: Use export async function generateMetadata() for dynamic pages
How To Fix: export async function generateMetadata({ params }: Props): Promise<Metadata> { ... }

Rule Description: Third-party scripts must use next/script with strategy="lazyOnload" or "afterInteractive"
How To Fix: Use <Script src='...' strategy='lazyOnload' /> — never raw <script> in JSX

Rule Description: Fonts must use display=swap to prevent invisible text — next/font handles this automatically
How To Check: Check for legacy @import Google Fonts in CSS
How To Fix: Replace @import Google Fonts with next/font/google: import { Inter } from 'next/font/google'

Rule Description: Use next/image for all content images — enables automatic WebP/AVIF conversion
How To Fix: Replace with from 'next/image'

Rule Description: next/image requires explicit width and height to prevent CLS
How To Fix: Add width={W} height={H} matching natural image ratio to every <Image> (or use fill with relative parent)

Rule Description: Hero/LCP image must have priority prop on next/image
How To Fix: Add priority prop to hero image: <Image src={...} priority />

Rule Description: next/image automatically generates srcset — ensure remotePatterns is configured for external images
How To Fix: Add allowed domains to next.config.js: images: { remotePatterns: [{ hostname: 'cdn.example.com' }] }
